---
title: "rq3_simulated_data"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-20"
---

```{r}
set.seed(123)

# --- Hyperparameter grid ---
hyperparams <- bind_rows(
  # GPT-5.1 and gpt-oss-120b: vary reasoning effort
  expand_grid(
    parser           = c("GROBID", "DPT-2"),
    embedding        = c("text-embedding-3-large", "text-embedding-3-small", "Qwen3-Embedding-8B"),
    llm              = c("GPT-5.1", "gpt-oss-120b"),
    reasoning_effort = c("Low", "Medium", "High"),
    temperature      = NA_character_,
    append_outputs   = c("Yes", "No")
  ),
  # Llama: vary temperature
  expand_grid(
    parser           = c("GROBID", "DPT-2"),
    embedding        = c("text-embedding-3-large", "text-embedding-3-small", "Qwen3-Embedding-8B"),
    llm              = "Llama-3.3-70B",
    reasoning_effort = NA_character_,
    temperature      = c("0", "0.5", "1"),
    append_outputs   = c("Yes", "No")
  )
) %>%
  mutate(hyperparam_id = row_number())


# --- Simulate base RC vs human data ---
dois       <- paste0("doi_", 1:100)
dimensions <- c("hypothesis", "datas", "inex", "samplesize",
                "manvars", "measurevars", "stats", "transf", "missd")
human_coders <- c("BC", "JC")

base <- expand_grid(doi = dois, dimension = dimensions, human_coder = human_coders) %>%
  mutate(
    doi        = as.integer(factor(doi)),
    cosine          = rbeta(n(), shape1 = 5, shape2 = 2),  # skewed towards high similarity
    deviation_agree = rbinom(n(), size = 1, prob = 0.7)
  )

# --- Simulate RQ3 data ---
data_rq3_cosine <- cross_join(hyperparams, base) %>%
  mutate(cosine = pmin(1, pmax(0, cosine + rnorm(n(), mean = 0, sd = 0.05))))

data_rq3_agree <- cross_join(hyperparams, base) %>%
  mutate(
    deviation_agree = if_else(
      runif(n()) < 0.1,
      1L - deviation_agree,
      deviation_agree
    )
  )

data_rq3 <- data_rq3_cosine %>%
  select(-deviation_agree) %>%   # drop the base version
  left_join(
    data_rq3_agree %>% select(hyperparam_id, doi, dimension, human_coder, deviation_agree),
    by = c("hyperparam_id", "doi", "dimension", "human_coder")
  )


data_rq3 <- data_rq3 %>% 
  rename(doi = paper_id)
  
write_csv(data_rq3, "data_rq3_simulated.csv")
```
